case_title: KWOCK HUNG ONG RESPONDENT VS. JOE WALSH DBA THE FIELD OF SAN FRANCISCO et al APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JAN-29-2004 - JUDGMENT IS ORDERED AND SIGNED BY JUDGE PRO TEM SEYMOUR SEIDSCHER ON MONDAY, FEBRUARY 2, 2004 FOR MR. KWOCK HUNG ONG AND AGAINST DEFENDANTS JOE WALSH, ELIZABETH LENIHAN, JOHN LENIHAN, DBA THE FIELD OF SAN FRANCISCO, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY FOR $750.00 PRICIPAL, $0.00 ATTORNEYS FEES, AND $122.01 COSTS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED.
CIVIL SUBPOENA FILED AND RETURNED SIGNED.
